summary: Completed testing of Pneu Price Scout scraper endpoints and frontend. All key features working: /api/scrape/enqueue creates jobs, /api/scraped-prices returns prices, /api/scraped-prices/best/{medida} returns best price, Scraper page loads with prices, refresh button works.

critical.issue: Returns 500 - scrape queue jobs (from /api/scrape/enqueue) mixed in same 'jobs' collection with upload jobs but have different schema. Job model expects fields like filename, total_items but scrape jobs have type, supplier_id, payload.
critical.fix: Either filter by type in get_jobs: query={'type': {'$exists': False}} OR use separate collection for scrape queue jobs

action_items: Fix /api/jobs endpoint to filter out scrape queue jobs OR use separate collection for scrape queue
critical_code_review_comments: Line 605-606 in server.py: /api/scrape/enqueue inserts jobs without 'id' field to same 'jobs' collection used by upload jobs - causes schema conflict
Suppliers: euromais and S. José Pneus have login/connectivity issues (expected based on agent context)

success_rate.backend: 93% (13/14 passed, 1 skipped due to known bug)

seed_data_creation: Created test scrape jobs via /api/scrape/enqueue with TEST_ prefix
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend APIs for scraper functionality work correctly. Scraped prices exist in DB for medidas 2055516, 1956515, 2255517 from MP24, Prismanil, Dispnal. S. José and Euromais have external connectivity issues. /api/jobs bug documented but does not affect main scraper workflow.

features_tested.endpoint_scraped_prices: PASS - returns scraped prices from DB
features_tested.endpoint_scraped_prices_best: PASS - returns best price for medida
features_tested.frontend_scraper_page: PASS - loads prices, shows status, refresh works
